one_time_description: Write down of investment in Treaty of $10,151,305 offset by Treaty loan forgiveness of $7,845,713 (net impact -$2,305,592)
economic_notes: Nation holds investments in k'awat'si Economic Development LP and General Partner Corp (wholly-owned), and Nanwakolas Forestry LP (40.278%), Nanwakolas Carbon Credit LP (33.98%), Nanwakolas Offset LP (26.18%). Nation is in Stage 4 (Agreement in Principle) of BC treaty negotiations. Big House construction fund of ~$2.98M held in trust.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Two significant one-time items: write-down of Investment in Treaty ($10,151,305) and Treaty loan forgiveness ($7,845,713), resulting in net charge of ~$2.3M to surplus. Nation has complex structure with 6 consolidated subsidiaries (including Gwa'sala-'Nakwaxda'xw School, CMHC Social Housing, Treaty, Hi'li'gam, 1139401 B.C. Ltd., Big House Society) and 4 entities on modified equity method. Portfolio investments of ~$28.7M held in Scotia Trust accounts. Big House trust fund ~$2.98M. Ottawa Trust Fund ~$336K. First Nation Loan Agreement (treaty negotiation debt) of $7,845,713 forgiven effective March 31, 2020. Distribution to members of $283,600 made during year. Auditor's office located in Nanaimo, BC. Financial statements signed January 7, 2021.
